briefdescription.para: scale for representing the distances between clusters
distances between the two merged clusters
Destruction of the data members of a Dendrogram object.
Computation of the agglomerative/divisive coefficient (Kaufman & Rousseeuw, pp. 212, 263).
Computation of the dendrogram on the basis of the cluster compositions.
Default constructor of the Dendrogram class.
Assignment operator of the Dendrogram class.
Writing on a single line of a Dendrogram object.

memberdef.argsstring: (StatError &error, const std::string path, bool exhaustive=false) const
memberdef.name: ascii_write

briefdescription.para: Writing of a Dendrogram object in a file at the spreadsheet format.
